description: Reduced documents of test/soak/accounts. Two shapes share the [/id] keyspace: a per-account reconstruction (id >= 0) carrying the latest reduced {set, balance, seq}, the connector's oracle, and an ok/mismatch verdict; and a per-shard conservation-violation sentinel keyed by a negative id (-(keyBegin+1)) carrying a `violation`. Root reduce is lastWriteWins: each id is owned by exactly one derivation shard which publishes it in increasing-seq order, so the latest write is the highest-seq truth.

id.description: Account id (>= 0) for a reconstruction doc, or a negative per-shard sentinel id for a conservation-violation doc.

seq.description: Highest seq applied to this account (reconstruction docs).

set.description: Reduced sorted membership after the latest event (reconstruction docs).

balance.description: Reduced cumulative balance after the latest event (reconstruction docs).

oracle.description: The connector's authoritative post-event truth for this account, carried for comparison and debugging.

ok.description: True iff the reconstructed {set, balance, seq} matched the oracle for the latest event of this account.

mismatch.description: Present iff ok is false; localizes the divergence (seq gap/dup/reorder, set drift, or balance drift).

violation.description: Present only on a sentinel doc: the non-zero global balance sum gathered across all shards this transaction.
